    Class
    Description
    Sample
    One received message delivered to a Subscription.
    SessionException
    Checked exception for session-layer failures (handshake failure, unexpected remote reply, publish on non-OPEN session, close-timeout, lease expired).
    SessionState
    The lifecycle states of a ZenohSession.
    Subscription
    A live subscription handle.
    ZenohSession
    A Zenoh 1.x client session over any Transport.

    ZenohSession.DiscoveryListener
    Callback invoked once per DECLARE record the router returns in response to an INTEREST.
